debug_info.goal:
L : Type u_1
inst✝³ : Field L
inst✝² : ValuativeRel L
inst✝¹ : TopologicalSpace L
inst✝ : IsNonarchimedeanLocalField L
e : L ≃+* L
x : L
⊢ (valuation L) (e x) = (valuation L) x

failed_attempts:
by
  have h := e.toRingEquiv.isUnit_map_iff
  simp_all [valuation_def, IsNonarchimedeanLocalField.valuation_def]

by
  have h := e.toRingEquiv.isUnit_map_iff
  simp_all [valuation_def, IsNonarchimedeanLocalField.valuation_def]

by
  have h := e.toFun_eq_coe
  simp_all [IsNonarchimedeanLocalField.valuation_mul, IsNonarchimedeanLocalField.valuation_one]
  <;> aesop

by
  have h₁ : e 0 = 0 := e.map_zero
  have h₂ : e 1 = 1 := e.map_one
  have h₃ : ∀ y, y ≠ 0 → e y ≠ 0 := fun y hy => e.injective.ne_iff.mpr hy
  have h₄ : ∀ y, valuation L (e y) = valuation L y := by
    intro y
    by_cases hy : y = 0
    · simp [hy, h₁]
    · have h₅ : e y ≠ 0 := h₃ y hy
      have h₆ : valuation L (e y) = valuation L y := by
        apply Eq.symm
        rw [← valuation_mul, e.map_mul, e.map_inv₀ (by simpa using hy)]
        simp [h₁, h₂, hy, h₅]
      exact h₆
  exact h₄ x
